mainEntity.name: How do I find a good online maths tutor?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix offers verified maths tutors with expertise in IB Maths AA & AI, IGCSE Maths (0580), A-Level Maths, AP Calculus AB & BC, and CBSE Mathematics. Book a free demo class to find the right match.

mainEntity.name: How much does online maths tutoring cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: PhyFix maths tutoring rates range from ₹500 to ₹3,000 per hour depending on tutor and level. Zero commission — you pay the tutor directly. Starting from $10/hr for school level.

mainEntity.name: Can I get help with IB Maths IA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PhyFix tutors specialise in IB Mathematics Internal Assessment support, helping students choose appropriate topics, structure their exploration, and achieve Level 4 scores.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer IGCSE Maths tutoring?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. PhyFix offers expert Cambridge IGCSE Maths (0580) tutoring for both Core and Extended levels, with past-paper focus and grade 8/9 strategies.
